blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
